name: Gold Royalty Corp.
summary: Gold Royalty Corp., a precious metals-focused royalty and streaming company, offers financing solutions to the metals and mining industry. It acquires royalties, streams, and similar interests at varying stages of the mine life cycle to build a portfolio offering near, medium, and longer-term attractive returns for its investors. The company holds a portfolio of 18 net smelter return (NSR) royalties ranging from 0.5% to 2% covering 12 projects located in the Americas, as well as additional rights to acquire 9 royalty interests from third parties holding royalties on certain of such properties. The company was incorporated in 2020 and is based in Vancouver, Canada. Gold Royalty Corp. is a subsidiary of GoldMining Inc.
